Perfect for those occasions when you're craving timeless style with extra impact, these statement earrings are set with pavé diamonds for a luxurious touch of sparkle. Sold as a pair and set in 14ct white gold, they're sure to leave a lasting impression.

products.title: Vega Large Earrings White
products.description: Bring some star power to your jewellery game with our large Vega earrings. In 18ct white gold, these star-shaped studs make a striking statement when worn. Weighing 4.94g, these large earrings are neatly set with 1.23ct diamonds for a beautiful finish. Available to order.

products.title: Kiklo drop earrings
products.description: Make a subtle but memorable statement in our Kiklo drop earrings. Set in 14ct yellow gold with a 12mm diameter, these distinctive earrings feature central diamond stones for a touch of sparkle. Timeless and versatile, they make the perfect gift option for that special someone (and yourself).

products.title: Short Identity Necklace With Diamond Bar
products.description: Make a luxurious statement in our diamond bar Identity necklace. Made from 9ct & 18ct yellow gold, this short Identity necklace features a distinctive 18ct white gold Identity bar set with diamonds for a subtle touch of timeless sparkle. Perfect for treating a loved one, this unique accessory is an easy way to add depth and dimension to your favourite all-occasion looks.

products.title: Synchronicity Yellow Gold and Diamond Ring
products.description: Indulge in the perfect luxurious ring combination with our Synchronicity Ring. Set in 18ct yellow gold with diamonds to the inner and outer components, this timeless ring is part of our Synchronicity range, a unique concept that seamlessly unites two ring components for a personalised jewellery combo you'll love.
